scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:template && bun run build:docs
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build && bun run --cwd packages/create build
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:packages && bun run typecheck:template && bun run typecheck:docs
scripts.typecheck:packages: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/create typecheck
